```{r}
                                                                          clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                                          clip_epsilon_bar = 2 * clip_epsilon,
                                                                          surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                          loss_type = "db")} ), cex = 0.2, col = 'red')
abline(v = depth_range[1],col = 'blue')
abline(v = depth_range[2],col = 'blue')

```

```{r}
depth_grid <- seq(depth_range[1] - 10, depth_range[2] + 5, length.out = 200)
plot(depth_grid, sapply(depth_grid, function(t){compute_total_loss_smooth_plus(assigned_trt = t,
                                                                          subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                                                          T = data$logWellDepth,
                                                                          krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                                                          outcome_resid = resids,
                                                                          propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                                                          cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS, 
                                                                          trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                                                          threshold_val = log(5), 
                                                                          kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                                                                          clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                                          clip_epsilon_bar = 2 * clip_epsilon,
                                                                          surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                          loss_type = "db")} ), cex = 0.2, col = 'red', main = 'loss_plus')
abline(v = depth_range[1],col = 'blue')
abline(v = depth_range[2],col = 'blue')

plot(depth_grid, sapply(depth_grid, function(t){compute_total_loss_smooth_minus(assigned_trt = t,
                                                                          subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                                                          T = data$logWellDepth,
                                                                          krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                                                          outcome_resid = resids,
                                                                          propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                                                          cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS, 
                                                                          trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                                                          threshold_val = log(5), 
                                                                          kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                                                                          clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                                          clip_epsilon_bar = 2 * clip_epsilon,
                                                                          surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                          loss_type = "db")} ), cex = 0.2, col = 'red', main = 'loss_minus')
abline(v = depth_range[1],col = 'blue')
abline(v = depth_range[2],col = 'blue')
```

###### Check loss_plus, loss_minus derivatitive

We need to make sure that both of loss_plus and loss_minus are convex, 

check decomposition of derivative, I think it is overall ok

```{r}
plot(depth_grid, sapply(depth_grid, function(t){d_compute_total_loss_smooth(assigned_trt = t,
                                                                                subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                                                                T = data$logWellDepth,
                                                                                krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                                                                outcome_resid = resids,
                                                                                propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                                                                smoothers = smoothers_RKHS,
                                                                                trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                                                                threshold_val = log(5),
                                                                                kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                                                                                clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                                                # clip_epsilon_bar = 2*clip_epsilon,
                                                                                surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                                loss_type = "db")}), main = "d_loss")

plot(depth_grid, sapply(depth_grid, function(t){d_compute_total_loss_smooth_plus(assigned_trt = t,
                                                                                subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                                                                T = data$logWellDepth,
                                                                                krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                                                                outcome_resid = resids,
                                                                                propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                                                                smoothers = smoothers_RKHS,
                                                                                trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                                                                threshold_val = log(5),
                                                                                kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                                                                                clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                                                clip_epsilon_bar = 2*clip_epsilon,
                                                                                surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                                loss_type = "db")}) - sapply(depth_grid, function(t){d_compute_total_loss_smooth_minus(assigned_trt = t,
                                                                                subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                                                                T = data$logWellDepth,
                                                                                krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                                                                outcome_resid = resids,
                                                                                propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                                                                # smoothers = smoothers_RKHS,
                                                                                trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                                                                threshold_val = log(5),
                                                                                kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                                                                                # clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                                                clip_epsilon_bar = 2*clip_epsilon,
                                                                                surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                                loss_type = "db")}), main = "d_loss")

plot(depth_grid, sapply(depth_grid, function(t){d_compute_total_loss_smooth(assigned_trt = t,
                                                                                subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                                                                T = data$logWellDepth,
                                                                                krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                                                                outcome_resid = resids,
                                                                                propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                                                                smoothers = smoothers_RKHS,
                                                                                trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                                                                threshold_val = log(5),
                                                                                kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                                                                                clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                                                # clip_epsilon_bar = 2*clip_epsilon,
                                                                                surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                                loss_type = "db")}) - (sapply(depth_grid, function(t){d_compute_total_loss_smooth_plus(assigned_trt = t,
                                                                                subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                                                                T = data$logWellDepth,
                                                                                krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                                                                outcome_resid = resids,
                                                                                propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                                                                smoothers = smoothers_RKHS,
                                                                                trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                                                                threshold_val = log(5),
                                                                                kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                                                                                clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                                                clip_epsilon_bar = 2*clip_epsilon,
                                                                                surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                                loss_type = "db")}) - sapply(depth_grid, function(t){d_compute_total_loss_smooth_minus(assigned_trt = t,
                                                                                subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                                                                T = data$logWellDepth,
                                                                                krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                                                                outcome_resid = resids,
                                                                                propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                                                                # smoothers = smoothers_RKHS,
                                                                                trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                                                                threshold_val = log(5),
                                                                                kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                                                                                # clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                                                clip_epsilon_bar = 2*clip_epsilon,
                                                                                surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                                loss_type = "db")})))
```

Check plus: I think it looks overall OK.

Note that under the new loss function, clip_epsilon need to be large enough so that the derivative at a_u+ is larger than the derivative at a_u-. However, if clip_epsilon is large, we need a corresponding large clip_epsilon_bar to guarantee that the loss continous to increase for t>a_u

```{r}
depth_grid <- seq(depth_range[1] - 2, depth_range[2] + 2, length.out = 200)
i <- 2 # try it for different sample, i.e., different i


plot(depth_grid, sapply(depth_grid, function(t){d_compute_total_loss_smooth_plus(assigned_trt = t,
                                                                                subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                                                                T = data$logWellDepth,
                                                                                krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                                                                outcome_resid = resids,
                                                                                propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                                                                smoothers = smoothers_RKHS,
                                                                                trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                                                                threshold_val = log(5),
                                                                                kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                                                                                clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon * 10,
                                                                                # clip_epsilon = 30,
                                                                                clip_epsilon_bar = 5 * clip_epsilon,
                                                                                surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                                loss_type = "db")}), main = "d_loss_plus")

plot(depth_grid, sapply(depth_grid, function(t){numDeriv::grad(function(t){compute_total_loss_smooth_plus(assigned_trt = t,
                                                                          subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                                                          T = data$logWellDepth,
                                                                          krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                                                          outcome_resid = resids,
                                                                          propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                                                          cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS, 
                                                                          trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                                                          threshold_val = log(5), 
                                                                          kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                                                                          clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon * 10,
                                                                          # clip_epsilon = 30,
                                                                          clip_epsilon_bar = 5 * clip_epsilon,
                                                                          # clip_epsilon_bar = 30,
                                                                          surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                          loss_type = "db")}, x = t)}),main = "d_loss_plus NumDeriv")

plot(depth_grid, sapply(depth_grid, function(t){d_compute_total_loss_smooth_plus(assigned_trt = t,
                                                                          subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                                                          T = data$logWellDepth,
                                                                          krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                                                          outcome_resid = resids,
                                                                          propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                                                          smoothers = smoothers_RKHS,
                                                                          trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                                                          threshold_val = log(5),
                                                                          kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                                                                          clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon * 10,
                                                                          # clip_epsilon = 30,
                                                                          clip_epsilon_bar = 5 * clip_epsilon,
                                                                          surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                          loss_type = "db")}) - sapply(depth_grid, function(t){numDeriv::grad(function(t){compute_total_loss_smooth_plus(assigned_trt = t,
                                                                          subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                                                          T = data$logWellDepth,
                                                                          krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                                                          outcome_resid = resids,
                                                                          propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                                                          cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS, 
                                                                          trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                                                          threshold_val = log(5), 
                                                                          kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                                                                          clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon * 10,
                                                                          # clip_epsilon = 30,
                                                                          clip_epsilon_bar = 5 * clip_epsilon,
                                                                          surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                          loss_type = "db")}, x = t)}))
```

Why at the end and beginning, there is a tiny difference. But we will skip this difference for now and hope it won't affect the results.

Check minus: I think it looks overall OK.

```{r}
depth_grid <- seq(depth_range[1] - 2, depth_range[2] + 2, length.out = 200)
i <- 4 # try it for different sample, i.e., different i
plot(depth_grid, sapply(depth_grid, function(t){d_compute_total_loss_smooth_minus(assigned_trt = t,
                                                                          subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                                                          T = data$logWellDepth,
                                                                          krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                                                          outcome_resid = resids,
                                                                          propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                                                          # smoothers = smoothers_RKHS,
                                                                          trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                                                          threshold_val = log(5),
                                                                          kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                                                                          # clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                                          # clip_epsilon_bar = 30,
                                                                          clip_epsilon_bar = 5 * clip_epsilon,
                                                                          surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                          loss_type = "db")}))

plot(depth_grid, sapply(depth_grid, function(t){numDeriv::grad(function(t){compute_total_loss_smooth_minus(assigned_trt = t,
                                                                          subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                                                          T = data$logWellDepth,
                                                                          krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                                                          outcome_resid = resids,
                                                                          propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                                                          # cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS,
                                                                          trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                                                          threshold_val = log(5),
                                                                          kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                                                                          # clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                                          # clip_epsilon_bar = 30,
                                                                          clip_epsilon_bar = 5 * clip_epsilon,
                                                                          surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                          loss_type = "db")}, x = t)}))

plot(depth_grid, sapply(depth_grid, function(t){d_compute_total_loss_smooth_minus(assigned_trt = t,
                                                                          subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                                                          T = data$logWellDepth,
                                                                          krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                                                          outcome_resid = resids,
                                                                          propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                                                          # smoothers = smoothers_RKHS,
                                                                          trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                                                          threshold_val = log(5),
                                                                          kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                                                                          # clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                                          # clip_epsilon_bar = 30,
                                                                          clip_epsilon_bar = 5 * clip_epsilon,
                                                                          surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                          loss_type = "db")}) - sapply(depth_grid, function(t){numDeriv::grad(function(t){compute_total_loss_smooth_minus(assigned_trt = t,
                                                                          subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                                                          T = data$logWellDepth,
                                                                          krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                                                          outcome_resid = resids,
                                                                          propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                                                          # cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS,
                                                                          trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                                                          threshold_val = log(5),
                                                                          kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                                                                          # clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                                          # clip_epsilon_bar = 30,
                                                                          clip_epsilon_bar = 5 * clip_epsilon,
                                                                          surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                          loss_type = "db")}, x = t)}))
```

###### visualize DC approximation 

we choose different 
```{r}
depth_grid <- seq(depth_range[1] - 0.2, depth_range[2] + 0.2, length.out = 200)
i <- 2 # try it for different sample, i.e., different i
assigned_trt_old <- depth_range[1]
assigned_trt_old <- mean(depth_range)
plot(depth_grid, sapply(depth_grid, function(t){compute_total_loss_smooth_dc_approx(assigned_trt = t,
                                                                          assigned_trt_old = assigned_trt_old,
                                                                          subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                                                          T = data$logWellDepth,
                                                                          krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                                                          outcome_resid = resids,
                                                                          propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                                                          cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS, 
                                                                          smoothers = smoothers_RKHS,
                                                                          trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                                                          threshold_val = log(5), 
                                                                          kernel_bw= kernel_bw, 
                                                                          clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                                          clip_epsilon_bar = 100,
                                                                          surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                          loss_type = "db")}), cex = 0.2, col = 'blue')

lines(depth_grid, sapply(depth_grid, function(t){compute_total_loss_smooth(assigned_trt = t,
                                                                            subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                                                            T = data$logWellDepth,
                                                                            krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                                                            outcome_resid = resids,
                                                                            propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                                                            cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS,
                                                                            trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                                                            threshold_val = log(5),
                                                                            kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                                                                            clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                                            surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                            loss_type = "db")}), cex = 0.2)
abline(v = assigned_trt_old, col='red')
abline(v = indirect_policy_DB[sub_indices[i]], col='green')

```
Why it is decreasing when t is larger than right boundary. Because the clip_epsilon_bar is not large enough, it has to be larger than

Also, we found that initial point is important, there is possibility that DC algorithm would be stuck in local minimum. For example, if the initial point is the minimum of DC approx loss but is not the global minimum of original loss.

###### Implementation of Individually optimize DB loss: DC algorithm

```{r}
kernel_bw <- 1.06 * sd(data$logWellDepth) *nrow(data)^(-1/5)
direct_individual_small_DC <- c()

# initial_policy <- cbind(rep(1,nrow(data)), diag(nrow(data))) %*% params_initial_glmnet


for(i in 1:length(sub_indices)){
  cat(i,'-th sample\n')
  # assigned_trt_old <- mean(depth_range)
  # assigned_trt_old <- depth_range[1] - 5
  assigned_trt_old <- depth_range[2] + 5
  max_iter <- 400
  tol <- 1e-6
  for(k in 1:max_iter) {
    
    # Solve the convex subproblem
    # cat(k,'-th iteration of DC algorithm','\n')
    sub_result <- optim(par = assigned_trt_old, 
                        fn = compute_total_loss_smooth_dc_approx, 
                        gr = d_compute_total_loss_smooth_dc_approx, # we try the case with/without gr
                        assigned_trt_old = assigned_trt_old,
                        # assigned_trt_old = initial_policy[sub_indices[i]],
                        subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                        T = data$logWellDepth,
                        krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                        outcome_resid = resids,
                        propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                        cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS, 
                        smoothers = smoothers_RKHS,
                        trt_bounds = depth_range,
                        threshold_val = log(5), 
                        kernel_bw= kernel_bw, 
                        # clip_epsilon = 1,
                        # clip_epsilon_bar = 1000,
                        clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon * 10,
                        clip_epsilon_bar = 5 * clip_epsilon,
                        surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                        loss_type = "db",
                        method = "L-BFGS-B" )#, 
                        # control = list(maxit = 100, trace = 1))
    
    assigned_trt <- sub_result$par
    
    
    # 3. Check for convergence
    change <- sqrt(sum((assigned_trt_old - assigned_trt)^2))
    # cat(sprintf("Iter: %d, Change: %f, Objective: %f\n", k, change, sub_result$value))
    
    if (change < tol) {
      cat("--- DC Algorithm Converged ---\n")
      assigned_trt_old <- assigned_trt
      break
    }
    assigned_trt_old <- assigned_trt
  }
  cat('individual_small_DC: ', assigned_trt_old,'\n\n')
  direct_individual_small_DC <- c(direct_individual_small_DC, assigned_trt_old)
  cat('indirect RKHS: ',indirect_policy_RKHS[sub_indices[i]],'\n\n')
  cat('indirect DB: ', indirect_policy_DB[sub_indices[i]],'\n\n')
  
}
```

```{r}
plot(indirect_policy_DB[sub_indices], direct_individual_small_DC)
abline(0,1,col='red')
```

```{r}
cat('direct_individual_small_DC\n')
direct_individual_small_DC
cat('\n')
# cat('direct_individual_small\n')
# direct_individual_small
# cat('\n')
cat('indirect_policy_DB\n')
indirect_policy_DB[sub_indices]
cat('\n')
cat('indirect_policy_RKHS\n')
indirect_policy_RKHS[sub_indices]
```

Check the samples DC fails to find the optimum

```{r}
which(abs(direct_individual_small_DC - indirect_policy_DB[sub_indices]) > 0.1)

which(abs(direct_individual_small_DC - indirect_policy_RKHS[sub_indices]) > 0.1)

# which(abs(indirect_policy_DB[sub_indices] - indirect_policy_RKHS[sub_indices]) > 0.01)
```

```{r}
direct_individual_small_DC[which(abs(direct_individual_small_DC - indirect_policy_DB[sub_indices]) > 0.01)]
indirect_policy_DB[sub_indices[which(abs(direct_individual_small_DC - indirect_policy_DB[sub_indices]) > 0.01)]]
```

Then, we visualize the loss function where samples DC fails to find the optimum

```{r}
depth_grid <- seq(depth_range[1] - 2, depth_range[2] + 2, length.out = 200)

# for(i in which(abs(direct_individual_small_DC - indirect_policy_DB[sub_indices]) > 0.01)){
for(i in which(abs(direct_individual_small_DC - indirect_policy_DB[sub_indices]) > 0.1)){
  cat('loss function of ',i,'-th sample\n')
  plot(depth_grid, sapply(depth_grid, function(t){compute_total_loss_smooth(assigned_trt = t,
                                                                            subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                                                            T = data$logWellDepth,
                                                                            krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                                                            outcome_resid = resids,
                                                                            propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                                                            cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS, 
                                                                            trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                                                            threshold_val = log(5), 
                                                                            kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                                                                            clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                                            surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                            loss_type = "db")}), cex = 0.1, main = paste('DB loss of ',i,'-th sample'))
  abline(v = indirect_policy_DB[sub_indices[i]], col = 'red')
  abline(v = indirect_policy_RKHS[sub_indices[i]], col = 'green')
  abline(v = direct_individual_small_DC[i], col = 'yellow')
  # abline(v = mean(depth_range), col = 'purple')
  abline(v = depth_range[1] - 1.5, col = 'purple')
  abline(v = depth_range[1], col = 'blue',lty = 2)
  abline(v = depth_range[2], col = 'blue',lty = 2)
  legend("topright",                       # You can choose a different position (e.g., "topleft", "bottomright")
       legend = c("Indirect Policy (DB)", "Indirect Policy (RKHS)", "Direct (Indiviaul DB DC)","Initial Point"),
       col = c("red", "green","yellow","purple"),
       lty = 1,                            # Use lty=1 for solid lines
       lwd = 2)                           # Optional: Make the lines in the legend a bit thicker for visibility

}
```

I think what in common is they stuck in local minimum, let's visualize DC algorithm for these sample step by step. If we increase iteration steps, can this problem will resolved?

It cannot be resolved, actually, DC algorithm is local minimum algorithm and can be stuck on stationary point. It only guarantees that it converges to a critical point. 

Whether or not converging to global optimum highly depends on the starting points. A multi-start approach is suggesting. We can choose multiple starting point, and the choose the converging point with the minimal loss function.

Based on our experiment, using the middle of depth range gives the best result( When we change the data, it is not the case. So it actually depends)

```{r}
max_iter <- 50
tol <- 1e-6

kernel_bw <- 1.06 * sd(data$logWellDepth) *nrow(data)^(-1/5)
depth_range <- c(min(data$logWellDepth), max(data$logWellDepth))


i <- 2

assigned_trt_old <- indirect_policy_RKHS[sub_indices[i]]

for (k in 1:max_iter) {
    
    # Solve the convex subproblem
    cat(k,'-th iteration of DC algorithm','\n')
    sub_result <- optim(par = assigned_trt_old, 
                        fn = compute_total_loss_smooth_dc_approx, 
                        # gr = d_compute_total_loss_smooth_dc_approx, # we try the case with/without gr
                        assigned_trt_old = assigned_trt_old,
                        subject_idx = train_indices[i],
                        T = data$logWellDepth,
                        krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                        outcome_resid = resids,
                        propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                        cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS, 
                        smoothers = smoothers_RKHS,
                        trt_bounds = depth_range,
                        threshold_val = log(5), 
                        kernel_bw= kernel_bw, 
                        clip_epsilon = 1,
                        clip_epsilon_bar = 50,
                        surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                        loss_type = "db",
                        method = "L-BFGS-B", 
                        control = list(maxit = 60, trace = 3))
    
    assigned_trt <- sub_result$par
    
    # 3. Check for convergence
    change <- sqrt(sum((assigned_trt_old - assigned_trt)^2))
    cat(sprintf("Iter: %d, Change: %f, Objective: %f\n", k, change, sub_result$value))
    
    if (change < tol) {
      cat("--- DC Algorithm Converged ---\n")
      assigned_trt_old <- assigned_trt
      break
    }
    assigned_trt_old <- assigned_trt
}
cat('DC individual result: ', assigned_trt_old, '\n')
cat('indirect DB policy: ', indirect_policy_DB[sub_indices[i]], '\n')
```

```{r}
compute_total_loss_smooth(assigned_trt = assigned_trt_old,
                          subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                          T = data$logWellDepth,
                          krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                          outcome_resid = resids,
                          propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                          cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS, 
                          trt_bounds = depth_range,
                          threshold_val = log(5), 
                          kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                          clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                          surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                          loss_type = "db")

compute_total_loss_smooth(assigned_trt = indirect_policy_DB[sub_indices[i]],
                          subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                          T = data$logWellDepth,
                          krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                          outcome_resid = resids,
                          propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                          cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS, 
                          trt_bounds = depth_range,
                          threshold_val = log(5), 
                          kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                          clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                          surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                          loss_type = "db")
```

###### visualize DC approximation step by step

I write the analysis of this in the note, currently, we haven't had a good idea to solve it. 

```{r}
max_iter <- 10
tol <- 1e-5

kernel_bw <- 1.06 * sd(data$logWellDepth) *nrow(data)^(-1/5)
depth_range <- c(min(data$logWellDepth), max(data$logWellDepth))

depth_grid <- seq(depth_range[1] - 2, depth_range[2] + 2, length.out = 200)

i <- 20

# assigned_trt_old <- mean(depth_range)
# assigned_trt_old <- depth_range[1]
assigned_trt_old <- initial_policy[sub_indices[i]]
assigned_trt_old <- 10
for (k in 1:max_iter) {
    
    # Solve the convex subproblem
    # cat(k,'-th iteration of DC algorithm','\n')
    sub_result <- optim(par = assigned_trt_old, 
                        fn = compute_total_loss_smooth_dc_approx, 
                        gr = d_compute_total_loss_smooth_dc_approx, # we try the case with/without gr
                        assigned_trt_old = assigned_trt_old,
                        subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                        T = data$logWellDepth,
                        krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                        outcome_resid = resids,
                        propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                        cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS, 
                        smoothers = smoothers_RKHS,
                        trt_bounds = depth_range,
                        threshold_val = log(5), 
                        kernel_bw= kernel_bw, 
                        clip_epsilon = 1,
                        clip_epsilon_bar = 1000,
                        surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                        loss_type = "db",
                        method = "L-BFGS-B", 
                        control = list(maxit = 100, trace = 1))
    
    assigned_trt <- sub_result$par
    
    # draw the plot
    depth_grid <- seq(min(depth_range[1], assigned_trt_old - 0.5), max(depth_range[2] , assigned_trt_old + 0.5), length.out = 200)
    plot(depth_grid, sapply(depth_grid, function(t){compute_total_loss_smooth_dc_approx(assigned_trt = t,
                                                                          assigned_trt_old = assigned_trt_old,
                                                                          subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                                                          T = data$logWellDepth,
                                                                          krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                                                          outcome_resid = resids,
                                                                          propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                                                          cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS,
                                                                          smoothers = smoothers_RKHS,
                                                                          trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                                                          threshold_val = log(5),
                                                                          kernel_bw= kernel_bw,
                                                                          clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                                          clip_epsilon_bar = 1000,
                                                                          surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                          loss_type = "db")}), cex = 0.2, col = 'blue', main = 'middle step')

    lines(depth_grid, sapply(depth_grid, function(t){compute_total_loss_smooth(assigned_trt = t,
                                                                            subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                                                            T = data$logWellDepth,
                                                                            krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                                                            outcome_resid = resids,
                                                                            propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                                                            cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS,
                                                                            trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                                                            threshold_val = log(5),
                                                                            kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                                                                            clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                                            surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                            loss_type = "db")}), cex = 0.2)
    abline(v = assigned_trt, col='red')
    abline(v = assigned_trt_old, col='blue')
    abline(v = indirect_policy_DB[sub_indices[i]], col='green')

    legend("topright",                       # You can choose a different position (e.g., "topleft", "bottomright")
       legend = c("sub optimal", "initial policy", "optimal"),
       col = c("red", "blue","green"),
       lty = 1,                            # Use lty=1 for solid lines
       lwd = 2)
    
    # 3. Check for convergence
    change <- sqrt(sum((assigned_trt_old - assigned_trt)^2))
    cat(sprintf("Iter: %d, Change: %f, Objective: %f\n", k, change, sub_result$value))
    
    if (change < tol) {
      cat("--- DC Algorithm Converged ---\n")
      assigned_trt_old <- assigned_trt
      break
    }
    assigned_trt_old <- assigned_trt
}

cat('DC individual result: ', assigned_trt_old, '\n')
cat('indirect DB policy: ', indirect_policy_DB[sub_indices[i]], '\n')
cat('indirect RKHS policy: ', indirect_policy_RKHS[sub_indices[i]], '\n')
depth_grid <- seq(depth_range[1] - 2, depth_range[2] + 2, length.out = 200)
plot(depth_grid, sapply(depth_grid, function(t){compute_total_loss_smooth(assigned_trt = t,
                                                                          subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                                                          T = data$logWellDepth,
                                                                          krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                                                          outcome_resid = resids,
                                                                          propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                                                          cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS,
                                                                          trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                                                          threshold_val = log(5),
                                                                          kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                                                                          clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                                          surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                          loss_type = "db")}), cex = 0.2, main = 'final')
abline(v = assigned_trt_old, col='blue')
abline(v = indirect_policy_DB[sub_indices[i]], col='green')

legend("topright",                       # You can choose a different position (e.g., "topleft", "bottomright")
   legend = c("sub optimal", "DB optimal"),
   col = c("blue","green"),
   lty = 1,                            # Use lty=1 for solid lines
   lwd = 2)
```
The recent failure of optimization is because I revise the derivative of loss_minus, but not loss_plus, that will make the gr at (right_boundary + small_value) too large, even it is the right direction, it is hard to find a step size that is small enough to make loss_dc_approx decrease.


```{r}
# test the gradient of loss_minus at boundary
compute_total_loss_smooth_plus(assigned_trt = assigned_trt_old,
                                subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                T = data$logWellDepth,
                                krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                outcome_resid = resids,
                                propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS,
                                trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                threshold_val = log(5),
                                kernel_bw= kernel_bw,
                                clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                clip_epsilon_bar = 1000,
                                surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                loss_type = "db") 

d_compute_total_loss_smooth_dc_approx(assigned_trt = assigned_trt_old,
                                      assigned_trt_old = assigned_trt_old,
                                      subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                      T = data$logWellDepth,
                                      krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                      outcome_resid = resids,
                                      propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                      smoothers = smoothers_RKHS,
                                      cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS,
                                      trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                      threshold_val = log(5),
                                      kernel_bw= kernel_bw,
                                      clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                      clip_epsilon_bar = 1000,
                                      surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                      loss_type = "db")
d_compute_total_loss_smooth_plus(assigned_trt = assigned_trt_old,
                                subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                T = data$logWellDepth,
                                krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                outcome_resid = resids,
                                propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                smoothers = smoothers_RKHS,
                                trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                threshold_val = log(5),
                                kernel_bw= kernel_bw,
                                clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                clip_epsilon_bar = 1000,
                                surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                loss_type = "db") 

d_compute_total_loss_smooth_minus(assigned_trt = assigned_trt_old,
                                subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                T = data$logWellDepth,
                                krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                outcome_resid = resids,
                                propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                smoothers = smoothers_RKHS,
                                trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                threshold_val = log(5),
                                kernel_bw= kernel_bw,
                                clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                clip_epsilon_bar = 1000,
                                surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                loss_type = "db") 

d_compute_total_loss_smooth(assigned_trt = assigned_trt_old - 0.1,
                          subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                          T = data$logWellDepth,
                          krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                          outcome_resid = resids,
                          propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                          cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS,
                          smoothers = smoothers_RKHS,
                          trt_bounds = depth_range,
                          threshold_val = log(5),
                          kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                          clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                          surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                          loss_type = "db")
```

```{r}
# test dc approx loss function value
compute_total_loss_smooth_dc_approx(assigned_trt = assigned_trt_old - 0.2,
                                    assigned_trt_old = assigned_trt_old,
                                    subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                    T = data$logWellDepth,
                                    krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                    outcome_resid = resids,
                                    propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                    cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS,
                                    smoothers = smoothers_RKHS,
                                    trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                    threshold_val = log(5),
                                    kernel_bw= kernel_bw,
                                    clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                    clip_epsilon_bar = 1000,
                                    surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                    loss_type = "db")
```




```{r}
compute_total_loss_smooth_minus(assigned_trt = assigned_trt_old,
                                  subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                  T = data$logWellDepth,
                                  krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                  outcome_resid = resids,
                                  propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                  cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS,
                                  trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                  threshold_val = log(5),
                                  kernel_bw= kernel_bw,
                                  clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                  clip_epsilon_bar = 1,
                                  surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                  loss_type = "db") 
```

```{r}
d_compute_total_loss_smooth_minus(assigned_trt = assigned_trt_old,
                                  subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                  T = data$logWellDepth,
                                  krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                  outcome_resid = resids,
                                  propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                  smoothers = smoothers_RKHS,
                                  trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                  threshold_val = log(5),
                                  kernel_bw= kernel_bw,
                                  clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                  clip_epsilon_bar = 1,
                                  surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                  loss_type = "db")
```




###### check derivative of loss dc approximation

We first visualize one of it

```{r}
depth_grid <- seq(depth_range[1] - 2, depth_range[2] + 2, length.out = 200)
i <- 10 # try it for different sample, i.e., different i

plot(depth_grid, sapply(depth_grid, function(t){d_compute_total_loss_smooth_dc_approx(assigned_trt = t,
                                                                                      assigned_trt_old = mean(depth_range),
                                                                                      subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                                                                      T = data$logWellDepth,
                                                                                      krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                                                                      outcome_resid = resids,
                                                                                      propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                                                                      cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS,
                                                                                      smoothers = smoothers_RKHS,
                                                                                      trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                                                                      threshold_val = log(5),
                                                                                      kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                                                                                      clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                                                      clip_epsilon_bar = 70,
                                                                                      surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                                      loss_type = "db")}))

plot(depth_grid, sapply(depth_grid, function(t){numDeriv::grad(function(t){compute_total_loss_smooth_dc_approx(assigned_trt = t,
                                                                                      assigned_trt_old = mean(depth_range),
                                                                                      subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                                                                      T = data$logWellDepth,
                                                                                      krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                                                                      outcome_resid = resids,
                                                                                      propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                                                                      cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS,
                                                                                      smoothers = smoothers_RKHS,
                                                                                      trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                                                                      threshold_val = log(5),
                                                                                      kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                                                                                      clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                                                      clip_epsilon_bar = 70,
                                                                                      surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                                      loss_type = "db")}, x = t)}))

plot(depth_grid, sapply(depth_grid, function(t){d_compute_total_loss_smooth_dc_approx(assigned_trt = t,
                                                                                      assigned_trt_old = mean(depth_range),
                                                                                      subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                                                                      T = data$logWellDepth,
                                                                                      krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                                                                      outcome_resid = resids,
                                                                                      propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                                                                      cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS,
                                                                                      smoothers = smoothers_RKHS,
                                                                                      trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                                                                      threshold_val = log(5),
                                                                                      kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                                                                                      clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                                                      clip_epsilon_bar = 70,
                                                                                      surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                                      loss_type = "db")}) - sapply(depth_grid, function(t){numDeriv::grad(function(t){compute_total_loss_smooth_dc_approx(assigned_trt = t,
                                                                                      assigned_trt_old = mean(depth_range),
                                                                                      subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                                                                      T = data$logWellDepth,
                                                                                      krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                                                                      outcome_resid = resids,
                                                                                      propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                                                                      cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS,
                                                                                      smoothers = smoothers_RKHS,
                                                                                      trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                                                                      threshold_val = log(5),
                                                                                      kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                                                                                      clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                                                      clip_epsilon_bar = 70,
                                                                                      surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                                      loss_type = "db")}, x = t)}))
```

Then check the optimization use or not use gr in optim


```{r}
kernel_bw <- 1.06 * sd(data$logWellDepth) *nrow(data)^(-1/5)
direct_individual_small_DC <- c()

for(i in 1:length(sub_indices)){
  cat(i,'-th sample\n')
  assigned_trt_old <- mean(depth_range)
  # assigned_trt_old <- depth_range[1]
  # assigned_trt_old <- depth_range[2]
  max_iter <- 100
  for(k in 1:max_iter) {
    
    # Solve the convex subproblem
    # cat(k,'-th iteration of DC algorithm','\n')
    sub_result <- optim(par = assigned_trt_old, 
                        fn = compute_total_loss_smooth_dc_approx, 
                        gr = d_compute_total_loss_smooth_dc_approx, # we try the case with/without gr
                        assigned_trt_old = assigned_trt_old,
                        subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                        T = data$logWellDepth,
                        krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                        outcome_resid = resids,
                        propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                        cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS, 
                        smoothers = smoothers_RKHS,
                        trt_bounds = depth_range,
                        threshold_val = log(5), 
                        kernel_bw= kernel_bw, 
                        clip_epsilon = 1,
                        clip_epsilon_bar = 100,
                        surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                        loss_type = "db",
                        method = "L-BFGS-B" )#, 
                        # control = list(maxit = 100, trace = 1))
    
    assigned_trt <- sub_result$par
    
    
    # 3. Check for convergence
    # change <- sqrt(sum((assigned_trt_old - assigned_trt)^2))
    # cat(sprintf("Iter: %d, Change: %f, Objective: %f\n", k, change, sub_result$value))
    
    if (change < tol) {
      cat("--- DC Algorithm Converged ---\n")
      assigned_trt_old <- assigned_trt
      break
    }
    assigned_trt_old <- assigned_trt
  }
  cat('individual_small_DC: ', assigned_trt_old,'\n\n')
  direct_individual_small_DC <- c(direct_individual_small_DC, assigned_trt_old)
  cat('indirect RKHS: ',indirect_policy_RKHS[sub_indices[i]],'\n\n')
  cat('indirect DB: ', indirect_policy_DB[sub_indices[i]],'\n\n')
  
}


```

```{r}
direct_individual_small_DC
```

```{r}
direct_individual_small_DC
```


##### Individually optimize DB loss: DC algorithm, whole dataset

We can see that some of it is not able to leave the local minimum of at RKHS indirect policy. Thus, we try DC algorithm

This is way too slow, we will skip this, and try the small dataset experiment with the identity kernel and non-identity kernel

###### Check loss decomposition

First, we plot the loss functions, the result seems reasonable

```{r}
# we can actually do this for whole dataset
depth_grid <- seq(depth_range[1] - 5, depth_range[2] + 5, length.out = 200)
i <- 2 # try it for different sample, i.e., different i
plot(depth_grid, sapply(depth_grid, function(t){compute_total_loss_smooth(assigned_trt = t,
                                                                          subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                                                          T = data$logWellDepth,
                                                                          krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                                                          outcome_resid = resids,
                                                                          propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                                                          cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS,
                                                                          trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                                                          threshold_val = log(5),
                                                                          kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                                                                          clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                                          surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                          loss_type = "db")}) -
              sapply(depth_grid, function(t){compute_total_loss_smooth_plus(assigned_trt = t,
                                                                          subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                                                          T = data$logWellDepth,
                                                                          krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                                                          outcome_resid = resids,
                                                                          propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                                                          cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS, 
                                                                          trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                                                          threshold_val = log(5), 
                                                                          kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                                                                          clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                                          clip_epsilon_bar = 2 * clip_epsilon,
                                                                          surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                          loss_type = "db") - 
                                              compute_total_loss_smooth_minus(assigned_trt = t,
                                                                          subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                                                          T = data$logWellDepth,
                                                                          krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                                                          outcome_resid = resids,
                                                                          propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                                                          cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS, 
                                                                          trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                                                          threshold_val = log(5), 
                                                                          kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                                                                          clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                                          clip_epsilon_bar = 2 * clip_epsilon,
                                                                          surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                          loss_type = "db")} ), cex = 0.3, lwd = 3)  

```

###### Check loss_plus, loss_minus derivatitive

We need to make sure that both of them are convex

Check plus: I think it looks overall OK.

```{r}
depth_grid <- seq(depth_range[1] - 2, depth_range[2] + 2, length.out = 200)
i <- 10 # try it for different sample, i.e., different i
plot(depth_grid, sapply(depth_grid, function(t){d_compute_total_loss_smooth_plus(assigned_trt = t,
                                                                          subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                                                          T = data$logWellDepth,
                                                                          krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                                                          outcome_resid = resids,
                                                                          propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                                                          smoothers = smoothers_RKHS,
                                                                          trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                                                          threshold_val = log(5),
                                                                          kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                                                                          clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                                          clip_epsilon_bar = 30,
                                                                          surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                          loss_type = "db")}))

plot(depth_grid, sapply(depth_grid, function(t){numDeriv::grad(function(t){compute_total_loss_smooth_plus(assigned_trt = t,
                                                                          subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                                                          T = data$logWellDepth,
                                                                          krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                                                          outcome_resid = resids,
                                                                          propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                                                          cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS, 
                                                                          trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                                                          threshold_val = log(5), 
                                                                          kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                                                                          clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                                          clip_epsilon_bar = 30,
                                                                          surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                          loss_type = "db")}, x = t)}))

plot(depth_grid, sapply(depth_grid, function(t){d_compute_total_loss_smooth_plus(assigned_trt = t,
                                                                          subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                                                          T = data$logWellDepth,
                                                                          krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                                                          outcome_resid = resids,
                                                                          propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                                                          smoothers = smoothers_RKHS,
                                                                          trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                                                          threshold_val = log(5),
                                                                          kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                                                                          clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                                          clip_epsilon_bar = 30,
                                                                          surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                          loss_type = "db")}) - sapply(depth_grid, function(t){numDeriv::grad(function(t){compute_total_loss_smooth_plus(assigned_trt = t,
                                                                          subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                                                          T = data$logWellDepth,
                                                                          krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                                                          outcome_resid = resids,
                                                                          propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                                                          cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS, 
                                                                          trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                                                          threshold_val = log(5), 
                                                                          kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                                                                          clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                                          clip_epsilon_bar = 30,
                                                                          surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                          loss_type = "db")}, x = t)}))
```

Check minus: I think it looks overall OK.

```{r}
depth_grid <- seq(depth_range[1] - 2, depth_range[2] + 2, length.out = 200)
i <- 10 # try it for different sample, i.e., different i
plot(depth_grid, sapply(depth_grid, function(t){d_compute_total_loss_smooth_minus(assigned_trt = t,
                                                                          subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                                                          T = data$logWellDepth,
                                                                          krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                                                          outcome_resid = resids,
                                                                          propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                                                          smoothers = smoothers_RKHS,
                                                                          trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                                                          threshold_val = log(5),
                                                                          kernel_bw = kernel_bw,
                                                                          clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                                          clip_epsilon_bar = 30,
                                                                          surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                          loss_type = "db")}))

plot(depth_grid, sapply(depth_grid, function(t){numDeriv::grad(function(t){compute_total_loss_smooth_minus(assigned_trt = t,
                                                                          subject_idx = sub_indices[i],
                                                                          T = data$logWellDepth,
                                                                          krige_adjust = krige_values_RKHS,
                                                                          outcome_resid = resids,
                                                                          propensity_est = 1/weights_cbps$weights,
                                                                          cumint_smoothers = cumint_smoothers_RKHS, 
                                                                          trt_bounds = depth_range,
                                                                          threshold_val = log(5), 
                                                                          kernel_bw = kernel_bw, 
                                                                          clip_epsilon = clip_epsilon,
                                                                          clip_epsilon_bar = 30,
                                                                          surrogate_type = "Gaussian",
                                                                          loss_type = "db")}, x = t)}))

plot(depth_grid, sapply(depth_grid, function(t){d_compute_total_loss_smooth_minus(assigned_trt = t,
```
